summary: To relieve cought, to soothe sore throat, and to promote expectoration and discharge of pus.
Cough with profuse phlegm, swelling pain in throat, pulmonary welling abscess with hacking of pus and blood, fullness in chest and rib-side pain, dysentery, dribbling urinary block.
